Search by postcode, town or city

Find nearby fuel prices fast and compare them clearly

Search a postcode, town or city to see petrol stations within your chosen radius, compare all key fuel grades at a glance, and check opening times, travel cost and useful forecourt details before you set off.

Quickest way to search

Enter a location or tap Locate me for nearby stations ranked by the price, distance or update time that matters most to you.

Cost planner

Adjust these to estimate a full tank and the one-way fuel cost to reach each station.

Estimates are based on a 50L tank and 40 mpg. Drive cost is one-way from your search point to the station.

Nearby petrol stations

Cards show the brand first, then the trading name, full address, rank, opening status, fuel prices, travel cost and directions for quick comparison.

Useful forecourt details

Many stations also include details like car wash, toilets, motorway or supermarket status, phone number and whether fuel is available 24 hours.
